feature: MillenniumIT P1b — Participant Model + Privileges + Day Lifecycle + Iceberg
requirement: Firm/Participant hierarchy, granular privileges, start/end day lifecycle, iceberg orders

tasks.title: Firm/Participant types + privilege system + iceberg order type
tasks.description:
Add participant model, privilege system, and iceberg order support to securities-service types and stores.

Read src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go for existing types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go for store patterns.

Part A — Firm/Participant types (add to types.go):
- Firm struct: ID, Name, Status (FIRM_ACTIVE/FIRM_SUSPENDED/FIRM_DEACTIVATED), ClearingFirmID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- ExchangeParticipant struct: ID, FirmID, Name, Role string, Status (PARTICIPANT_ACTIVE/PARTICIPANT_SUSPENDED), Permissions []string, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- Permission constants: PERM_LOGIN, PERM_TRADE_EXECUTE, PERM_TRADE_READ, PERM_ORDER_CREATE, PERM_ORDER_CANCEL, PERM_ORDER_READ, PERM_ADMIN_MANAGE, PERM_MARKET_MANAGE, PERM_MASS_CANCEL

Part B — DayState type:
- DayState: DAY_PRE_OPEN, DAY_TRADING, DAY_POST_CLOSE, DAY_CLOSED

Part C — Iceberg order fields (add to SecurityOrder):
- HiddenQuantity int `json:"hidden_quantity,omitempty"` — total hidden portion
- VisibleQuantity int `json:"visible_quantity,omitempty"` — currently visible in book
- IsIceberg bool `json:"is_iceberg,omitempty"`

Part D — Stores (add to store.go):
- FirmStore interface: Create, Get, List, UpdateStatus
- ParticipantStore interface: Create, Get, GetByFirmID, List, UpdateStatus, UpdatePermissions
- InMemoryFirmStore, InMemoryParticipantStore
- Seed: one firm 'MSE-BROKER-1' (ACTIVE), one participant 'TRADER-1' (firm: MSE-BROKER-1, permissions: [TRADE_EXECUTE, ORDER_CREATE, ORDER_CANCEL, ORDER_READ])

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Permission checks + iceberg matching + day lifecycle engine
tasks.description:
Add permission validation to order submission, iceberg order matching logic, and day lifecycle management.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md for new types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/engine/engine.go for MatchOrder.
Read src/securities-service/internal/engine/session.go for SessionManager.

Part A — Permission checks (add to engine.go or new file engine/permissions.go):
- CheckOrderPermission(participantID string, action string, participantStore ParticipantStore) error
  - Get participant, check status is ACTIVE
  - Check action permission exists in participant's Permissions list
  - For ORDER_CREATE: verify PERM_ORDER_CREATE
  - For ORDER_CANCEL: verify PERM_ORDER_CANCEL
  - Return error if denied: 'participant lacks permission: ORDER_CREATE'
- Wire into handleSubmitOrder: check permission before processing order
- Wire into handleCancelOrder: check PERM_ORDER_CANCEL

Part B — Iceberg order matching (modify engine.go MatchOrder):
- When an iceberg order is submitted: set VisibleQuantity = min(order.Quantity, order.VisibleQuantity if set, else order.Quantity)
- During matching: only match against VisibleQuantity, not full Quantity
- After each fill: if remaining hidden > 0, replenish VisibleQuantity from HiddenQuantity
  - HiddenQuantity -= fill_qty (if fill came from hidden)
  - VisibleQuantity = min(original_visible_size, remaining_total)
- Iceberg orders appear in the book with only VisibleQuantity shown
- When all hidden quantity is exhausted, order behaves normally

Part C — Day lifecycle (new: src/securities-service/internal/engine/day_manager.go):
- DayManager struct with sessionManager, instrumentStore, currentDayState
- StartDay() error: transition from DAY_CLOSED → DAY_PRE_OPEN, transition all ACTIVE instruments to PRE_OPEN session
- StartTrading() error: transition from DAY_PRE_OPEN → DAY_TRADING, transition all instruments to CONTINUOUS (triggers opening auctions)
- EndTrading() error: transition from DAY_TRADING → DAY_POST_CLOSE, transition all instruments to CLOSING_AUCTION then CLOSED
- EndDay() error: transition from DAY_POST_CLOSE → DAY_CLOSED
- GetDayState() DayState

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: HTTP handlers + gateway routes for P1b features
tasks.description:
Add HTTP endpoints for firms, participants, day lifecycle, and wire to gateway.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md, T2.md.

Part A — Firm/Participant handlers (new: handlers_participant.go):
- GET /api/v1/securities/firms — list firms
- POST /api/v1/securities/firms — create firm
- GET /api/v1/securities/firms/{id} — get firm
- PUT /api/v1/securities/firms/{id}/status — suspend/activate
- GET /api/v1/securities/participants — list participants (?firm_id= filter)
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants — create participant (validate: firm_id exists, permissions array)
- PUT /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/permissions — update permissions

Part B — Day lifecycle handlers (new: handlers_day.go):
- POST /api/v1/securities/day/start — start day (DAY_CLOSED → DAY_PRE_OPEN)
- POST /api/v1/securities/day/trading — start trading (DAY_PRE_OPEN → DAY_TRADING)
- POST /api/v1/securities/day/end-trading — end trading (DAY_TRADING → DAY_POST_CLOSE)
- POST /api/v1/securities/day/end — end day (DAY_POST_CLOSE → DAY_CLOSED)
- GET /api/v1/securities/day/status — get current day state

Part C — Wire into server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for P1b features
tasks.description:
Write tests for firm/participant, permissions, iceberg orders, and day lifecycle.

Tests:

1. store_test.go additions:
- TestFirmStore_CRUD, TestParticipantStore_CRUD, TestParticipantStore_UpdatePermissions

2. engine_test.go additions:
- TestIceberg_BasicMatch — iceberg 100 total (20 visible), sell 20 → fills visible, replenishes
- TestIceberg_FullDrain — iceberg fully matched across multiple fills
- TestIceberg_RegularVsIceberg — regular order matched against iceberg's visible qty only
- TestPermission_Allowed — participant with ORDER_CREATE can submit
- TestPermission_Denied — participant without ORDER_CREATE gets rejected
- TestPermission_SuspendedParticipant — suspended participant gets rejected

3. engine/day_manager_test.go:
- TestDayManager_StartDay — CLOSED → PRE_OPEN
- TestDayManager_StartTrading — PRE_OPEN → TRADING (instruments go CONTINUOUS)
- TestDayManager_EndTrading — TRADING → POST_CLOSE
- TestDayManager_InvalidTransition — CLOSED → TRADING → error
- TestDayManager_GetState

Target: 70%+ on new code.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
